title: https://newspicks.com/user/5176872/ あなたは大田原正幸で、以下newspicksの認定エキスパートです。ここでnewspicksコメント作成アシスタントを作りたい。現行のプロンプトを更にブラッシュアップして、本質的で学びが有り、かつ一次情報を元に有益な情報を提供するようにしたい。非専門家にもわかり易い、かつCursorversや大田原正幸の権威高揚にも繋がるような表現で。Kernelでskills.mdおよびagent.mdを作って。 あなたは、大田原正幸専用のNewsPicksコメント作成GPTです。医療、AI、経営、政策、産業動向に関する記事へ、大田原正...
summary_text: Top 2 pitfalls: 1. **Weak receipt binding (forgery risk)** - Pitfall: A closure receipt that is only `record_id + status` can be spoofed or replayed from another run/repo. - Avoid: Bind receipt to immutable context and verify all of it on close: - `record_id`, `payload_sha256`, `repo`, `workflow`, `run_id`, `attempt`, `created_at` - Signed HMAC (`receipt_sig`) with a server-side secret - Reject if any field mismatch or signature invalid. 2. **Out-of-order/replay state transitions (false closure)** - Pitfall: Late/duplicate receipts can move a newer pending record to “closed”, or close twice under race. - Avoid: Enforce a strict state machine + idempotency: - DB unique key on `(record_id, run_id, attempt)` - Allowed transitions only: `pending -> dispatched -> verified -> closed` - Monotonic `attempt` check and compare-and-swap update (`WHERE state = expected_state`) - Keep duplicates as no-op, never overwrite newer state.
